sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4608" key="a)lohda/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλοηδάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n4608.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purgative prepared from aloes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.100</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
